title: Set Board Defaults - Not working
excerpt:

posts.author: AppManIDFA (Jelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Under customisation I have added Need To Start as an additional status option, however when creating a new board this status is not available in the dropdown.
So it appears the function is not working?
It’s at monday.com/admin/customization/boards

Anyone know why it’s not working?

Thanks

posts.author: AppManIDFA (Jelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
It seems that it does appear when adding a new status column to the board.
Apparently very new board is a template that can’t be adjusted, making the customisation option in my opinion mostly pointless at this point…

posts.author: Normjo (Jo Norman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I had the same issue. I had to update my Template’s Status column and after that all new boards I created using my saved template had the correct statuses.
I also had to manually update all existing boards to include the new status as they do not update when you update the defaults.
